message:
chore(beads): add 4 open bug reports from code review session

New issues filed by CODE_REVIEWER agent covering:
- bd-bug1: null bytes corruption in vfs.rs flush_on_destroy (P1)
- bd-bug2: MVCC/journal state divergence in journaled_commit on precheck failure (P1)
- bd-bug3: detached thread spawn without join in bw_tree.rs (P1)
- bd-bug4: unclosed file handles in xfstests-dev perf harness (P1)

All four are priority-1 bugs identified during automated scanning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
